We don't just sell you software. We run the agent for you.

Three managed services where Adelphos deploys the agent into your business process, runs it against your live data, and bills on outcomes — not seats. A human service team sits behind every agent to handle escalations, judgement calls, and client conversations.

Flagship Service · Managed by Adelphos

Finances

An agent that runs your quotations, invoicing, forecasting and reconciliation — connected to your live project data.

Days DSO drops from weeks to days
Hours quote turnaround, not days
Real-time cash forecast you actually trust
Weekly digest covers everything you need to know

Project Management

An agent that allocates tasks, tracks every deadline, ingests project data, and surfaces risk before it bites.

Daysto onboard new staff to the system
